title: Equipmentor
description: A mod adding different equipment sets for each material / ore that needs a equipment set.
body:
## **Equipmentor**
Introducing Equipmentor, a mod that adds a complete set of armor and tools for each ore and material in Minecraft that feels like it needs it!

### **Currently in Beta**

**Emerald Equipment:**

- Emerald Armor : Grants the Hero of the Village effect for easier trading.
- Emerald Tools : as good as iron but a little better.
  
**Lapis Lazuli Equipment:**

- Lapis Lazuli Armor : Grants the Underwater Breathing effect for those under water caves.
- Lapis Lazuli Tools : A little better then iron, worse then emerald, but better enchantibility then gold.

**Redstone Equipment:**

- Redstone Armor : Grants the Saturation effect for easier exploring in deserts or in caves.
- Redstone Tools : as good as lapis but worse durability.
  
### **Future Plans**

**Full Material Support**
- We plan to expand Equipmentor to include armor and tools for every ore and material in Minecraft, that feels like it needs a little bit of armor and tools to it.
### **Important Notes**

**Beta Status** 
- Equipmentor is still under development, so expect bugs and potential imbalances. We appreciate your feedback and patience as we work towards a polished release.
  
**Modding Policy** 
- Please respect the hard work of the development team. Copying or distributing this mod without permission is strictly prohibited. We encourage you to use this mod for personal enjoyment and to share your feedback with us.
Stay tuned for updates and new material sets!
